body:
## Rationale

**Critical LLM citation gap:** \`api/sitemap.js:568\` dynamically generates \`/llms/articles/<slug>.md\` URLs for every entry in \`ALBUM_ARTICLES\` — but **31 of 100 physical files are missing**. AI crawlers hitting these sitemapped URLs receive 404s, killing citation opportunities for a significant portion of the article corpus.

The sitemap generates them all:
\`\`\`js
...Object.keys(ALBUM_ARTICLES).map(slug => ({ loc: \`/llms/articles/\${slug}.md\`, ... }))
\`\`\`

But only 69 of 100 articles have physical files in \`public/llms/articles/\`.

## Missing files (31)

\`\`\`
aquiles-priester-drum-kit-guide.md
arin-ilejay-drum-setup.md
blake-richardson-drum-setup.md
breakdown-beat-guide.md
daniel-erlandsson-drum-setup.md
daray-drum-setup.md
double-bass-drumming-for-metal.md
frost-satyricon-drum-setup.md
gene-hoglan-drum-setup.md
george-kollias-nile-annihilation-drum-setup.md
hellhammer-drum-setup.md
how-to-play-blast-beats.md
how-to-play-polyrhythm-drums.md
how-to-tune-drums-for-metal.md
isaac-lamb-drum-setup.md
jaska-raatikainen-drum-setup.md
jay-weinberg-complete-drum-setup.md
jocke-wallgren-drum-setup.md
joey-jordison-drum-setup.md
john-otto-drum-setup.md
martin-lopez-drum-setup.md
matt-greiner-complete-drum-setup.md
nick-augusto-drum-setup.md
nick-menza-drum-setup.md
paul-mazurkiewicz-drum-setup.md
raymond-herrera-drum-setup.md
shannon-larkin-drum-setup.md
tim-yeung-drum-setup.md
travis-orbin-drum-setup.md
whats-in-navene-koperweiss-kit.md
whats-in-ray-luziers-kit.md
\`\`\`

## Template / data shape

Follow the exact pattern of existing files, e.g. \`public/llms/articles/whats-in-lars-ulrichs-kit.md\`:

\`\`\`markdown
# [Article Title] — [Drummer] Drum Setup

**Drummer:** [name]  
**Band:** [band]  
**Article type:** Drum setup breakdown  
**URL:** https://metalforge.io/articles/[slug]

## Overview
[2-3 sentence summary of drummer + article context]

## Drum Kit
[Key gear items from ALBUM_ARTICLES[slug].gear or drummer profile]

## Cymbals
[Cymbal details]

## Key Facts
- [3-5 bullet facts about kit/playing style]

## FAQ
**Q: What drum kit does [drummer] use?**  
A: [Answer from article content]

**Q: What cymbals does [drummer] use?**  
A: [Cymbal answer]

**Q: How much is [drummer]'s kit worth?**  
A: [Value estimate if available]

## Related
- [Drummer profile](https://metalforge.io/drummer/[slug])
- [Drummer licks](https://metalforge.io/drummers/[slug]/licks)
\`\`\`

## Files to touch

- Create all 31 files in \`/public/llms/articles/<slug>.md\`
- **No sitemap changes needed** — sitemap.js already generates these URLs dynamically

## Quality gate

- ≥200 words per file  
- ≥2 FAQ Q&As per file  
- Internal links to drummer profile + lick hub  
- Schema match to article type (drum kit / album breakdown / how-to guide)

## Source data

Pull content from:
- \`packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js\` — article metadata (drummer, band, gear)  
- \`packages/frontend/data/drummers/\` — full drummer gear profiles  
- Existing LLM article files as style guide

## Estimated organic uplift

Closes 31 active 404s for AI crawlers. Targets "how-to" + drummer-name + album gear queries. Compounds \`/llms/articles/\` citation surface from 69 → 100 files (45% growth).

## Verify

1. \`ls public/llms/articles/ | wc -l\` returns ≥ 100
2. Each file ≥ 200 words: \`wc -w public/llms/articles/joey-jordison-drum-setup.md\`
3. No HTTP 404 on \`/llms/articles/joey-jordison-drum-setup.md\` (curl or browser)
4. All 31 slugs from the list above present in directory
5. \`grep -l "FAQ" public/llms/articles/gene-hoglan-drum-setup.md\` → found

## Done

When all 31 files exist in \`public/llms/articles/\` with ≥ 200 words each.
title: SEO batch: /llms/articles/ — 31 missing LLM markdown files for sitemapped album articles (~31 files)
